data.reasoningText:
Now I have a good understanding of the project structure. Let me plan the implementation:

1. Models: Recipe, Category, RecipeSubmission
2. Services: RecipeService (in-memory data store)
3. Pages:
   - Home.razor - homepage with categories (static SSR)
   - Recipes.razor - browse recipes by category (static SSR)
   - RecipeDetail.razor - individual recipe with star rating (rating widget is interactive)
   - SubmitRecipe.razor - form to submit a recipe (interactive)
4. Components:
   - StarRating.razor - interactive star rating widget
5. Update NavMenu


6. Clean up the default Counter and Weather components

Time to start building out all the files.

+using RecipeSharingApp.Models;
+
+namespace RecipeSharingApp.Services;
+
+public class RecipeService
+{
+    private readonly List<Recipe> _recipes;
+    private int _nextId;
+    private readonly Lock _lock = new();
+
+    public RecipeService()
+    {
+        _recipes = GetSeedRecipes();
+        _nextId = _recipes.Max(r => r.Id) + 1;
+    }
+
+    public List<string> GetCategories() =>
+        _recipes.Select(r => r.Category).Distinct().Order().ToList();
+
+    public List<Recipe> GetRecipesByCategory(string category) =>
+        _recipes.Where(r => r.Category.Equals(category, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)).ToList();
+
+    public Recipe? GetRecipeById(int id) =>
+        _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == id);
+
+    public void AddRating(int recipeId, int stars)
+    {
+        if (stars < 1 || stars > 5) return;
+        lock (_lock)
+        {
+            var recipe = _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == recipeId);
+            if (recipe is not null)
+            {
+                recipe.TotalRatings++;
+                recipe.RatingSum += stars;
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    public void AddRecipe(RecipeSubmission submission)
+    {
+        lock (_lock)
+        {
+            _recipes.Add(new Recipe
+            {
+                Id = _nextId++,
+                Title = submission.Title.Trim(),
+                Category = submission.Category.Trim(),
+                Ingredients = submission.Ingredients
+                    .Split('\n', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)
+                    .ToList(),
+                Steps = submission.Steps
+                    .Split('\n', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)

+            });
+        }
+    }

data.content:
Build succeeded with 0 errors. Here's a summary of what was created:

**Project: RecipeSharingApp** (Blazor Web App, .NET 11, Server interactivity)

### Structure
```
Models/Recipe.cs          — Recipe & RecipeSubmission models
Services/RecipeService.cs — Singleton service with in-memory data + seed recipes
Components/
  StarRating.razor(.css)  — Interactive 1–5 star rating widget
  Pages/
    Home.razor(.css)      — Homepage with category cards (SSR)
    Recipes.razor         — Browse recipes by category (SSR)
    RecipeDetail.razor    — Full recipe view + interactive rating
    SubmitRecipe.razor    — Interactive form (title, category, ingredients, steps)
```

### Rendering strategy
- **Static SSR** for read-only pages (Home, Recipes, RecipeDetail layout)
- **`@rendermode InteractiveServer`** only on `StarRating` and `SubmitRecipe` — the two components needing interactivity
- 6 seed recipes across 5 categories (Pasta, Curries, Salads, Desserts, Mexican)
